reviews.review_title: Single best arcade shooter on the quest
reviews.review_description:
Absolutely amazing visuals, with a beautiful minimalistic synth asthetic. Preformance is great, haven't had a single issue on my Quest 3s. The main gimic of the enviroment changing arround you per level is just perfect, and the variety keeps it fresh while also letting you memorize the possibilities to get a better idea of what's up next.
Gameplay is challenging, expecting some decent sharp shooting to stay alive in the later levels if your unlucky. I love the upgrade progression with the limited slots and currency earned each round, it keeps things tense having to balance between getting enough points and having enough coins to keep up. The variety in upgrades is really fun, and by the end you might be one shotting the half the range in a massive explision.

And finally, my favorite part of how the devs handled this game: Microtransactions
Or rather, how well this game balances what should and shouldn't be paid content. By default you have the Pistol, and you unlock new game modes as you progress, but you can also purchase either a Shotgun or an SMG, along with an endless mode after finishing a tower. 
I really like how this is structured since the focus of the game is single shot, accuracy focuse shooting designed arround a pistol. So the additions of other weapons as DLC instead of base game content feels much more natural  especially with the base game being free and weapons only being 5$ a piece. 

Overall this is the single most enjoyable vr arcade type experience I've ever had. Hands down. It's refreshingly challenging, while being easy to pick up and start a round, with beautiful visuals and extremely satisfying gameplay. And there's enough content to last you a good long while even sticking to the free base game :3

developer_response.body:
Hey SparkyRiver250, thank you so much for taking the time to leave this review! We're glad to hear you're enjoying the game, and that there's a number of decisions we've made correctly.

If you have any more feedback we'd love to hear from you! You can join our Discord to chat with us directly (linked in-game) or reach us via email at support@protostargames.com.
- Protostar

reviews.review_description:
Update: Been playing a while, enjoy it a lot. That said, its annoyingly rigged. Blocks are delayed coming out to prevent reaching the target score when time is almost up frequently. Coin mods have occasionally failed to give gold for an entire round. 

If you fail to reach the target score and the game ends, you get a message that says HINT: Refresh store more often to find key mods. What??? I refreshed A LOT and the store gives 4 or 5 of the same weak mods over and over and over, occasionally offering a mod that will actually work for a high target  board. Still a fun game, but the rigging makes it less enjoyable.  At least make it a little more random so its interesting. 

I recently got a Quest 3s as my first VR headet. Saw this game recommended on reddit as a solid free game and decided to try. Really fun, challenging, and requires strategy to pick the right tools and mods between each round. 

Update: Fun at first, then frustrating once you realize its about random luck. The store lets you pick from 3 mods at a time but there are dozens of mods available and you frequently don't get a chance to level up things you've purchased.  It only shows 3 mods, then charges an increasing amount every time you want to view 3 more. I've gone in with over 200 coins and 4 mods to level up, but they didn't show up before I ran out of money paying the fees to "look" through the store. 

Update 2: Saw the developers response, appreciate their feedback and explaining their idea for the game. 

The updates on 4/1 and 4/2 have been awesome and gave a lot of different paths to avoid getting frustrated. Also made learning the mod and mod combos much easier. The June updates were a great addition, the stacks make it a lot more interesting.

developer_response.body:
Hey wiggle2025, thanks for updating your review. I can assure you, there's no mechanism rigging the game in any way! 

We'd love to know which wave, and which targets you're finding are appearing slowly, so that we can improve their spawn rate! Also regarding the coin glitch, it should always award you 2-5 coins. If you happen to be recording your run and notice the coin glitch doesn't award you anything, we'd love to see the footage!

Thanks again for taking the time to update your review, feel free to contact us at any time via Discord (linked in-game) or via email at support@protostargames.com.
- Protostar

reviews.review_description:
Brilliant game. Graphically it is bright and clear with atmospheric music adding to the enjoyment of the game. The arena really draws you in and the various different target levels vary from easy to quite difficult. Speed and accuracy are the key to doing well maintaining your level multiplayer is crucial as is picking the appropriate mods to get the highest score. Paid for endless mode and the new shot gun which is great, to help support the development. One of the best games I’ve played in a long time….BUT and it is a big BUT the last two levels before the bosses especially the penultimate level spoil the whole game for me with ridiculous increases in score required to finish the level and always a difficult target selection. Time and time again I get to the last but one level and end up more than 20k short of the required score which is infuriating. I have completed the game on the first three levels but as just stated the last but one level on level four is ridiculous. The higher levels are fun to play but how people are completing them I don’t know, but well done I think I need more practise and I have been playing this game a lot🤣 overall a brilliant game looking forward to more weapon releases and maybe a few tweaks on the later level score requirements. A few tweaks and it’s 5/5 for me brilliant.

Wanted to write another review but looks like I have to add to this.
Ohhhhh dear. Nerf nerf nerf. Played this since release paid for both guns and just when your having fun boooom. Do you developers not actually play your game after making changes. Difficulty three and above now a lottery if you get enough multipliers to survive the first 4-6 waves. Higher wave scores yet again before the final level just impossible to get frustration frustration and turn it off. Great game nerfed and ruined. Will wait for you to adjust until it’s enjoyable and playable again until then no thanks. This has been my most played game since release across several systems but no more.

Well here I go again. Not played in several weeks and was looking forward to my favourite blaster. Ohhhh dear me. What the hell have you done to this game wow. Is there someone new in the dev team that just doesn’t like people having fun or is it just a bad business plan or even self sabotage. I didn’t notice the update but when I viewed the score tables I knew straight away it’s been nerfed to hell AGAIN. Billions down to single or tens of millions. Updated and had a few games and just thought what an absolute travesty. This game was awesome and now calling it a chore is a plus. All the good points have been hammered and now it’s just hard work even on easy. Normal is super hard and just no fun. Even on normal mode you have put in the whirly modes that take away something that just destroys the game and your score. You can’t revolve the tower to see what’s coming I hit two on the bounce I couldn’t avoid and just stopped the game and started again. Where’s the good whirls that give you good bonuses it’s as though mister negative has taken over and doesn’t want you to have fun anymore? If your new to the game try and enjoy it but I think if your like me and have played from the first day of release you will be sad to see how a game can be nerfed so bad it just makes you shake your head. What the devs are trying to achieve I do not know but I’ll say it again play the game before and after the mods and if you really think this is now better then wow. I have been playing games since the late 70s I’m nearly 60 and this is one of the worst cases of nerfing a game I’ve ever seen. Whoever is in charge needs to change the plan because this is shocking.

developer_response.body:
Hey Bushtaman. Thank you for taking the time to update your review and sharing your experience with us. We're sorry the recent balance changes are destroying the fun for you. We generally approach balancing in favor of buffing over nerfing, but sometimes the consequences of leaving something in an over-powered state are too severe, and a slight nerf is needed. 

Nerfs aren't made lightly, and are usually only applied as a last resort after a tonne of play-testing. We're confident though that with recent changes we've made more play-styles viable, and we hope you hang around to explore some of the new synergies that exist!
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: The graphics are very good especially for a quest user like myself, like a vaporwave duck hunt with SO MUCH VARIETY, although the weapons cost money im not one too judge, 10/10 across the board. 😎🔥🔥🔥

developer_response.body:
Hey JareBear12, thank you so much for checking out Hyper Bullet and taking the time to leave a review! We're glad you're enjoying the game!

If you have any extra feedback we'd love to hear from you! You can reach us directly via our Discord (linked in-game) or via email at support@protostargames.com.
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: It is so rigged after the first level that it is not fun to play anymore. The awards and the points become so disproportionate and suddenly the physics start lagging / not working. Until they can come up with a good excuse for how come one can shoot all moving targets without a miss in the beginning waves but about after the middle you cannot hit a single target especially when there is only a.mere few seconds left to lose a life, even when not only they are stationary but also they are enlarged 5x  or how come you can hit the score and go 100% above the base score in the beginning and yet with all the power ups you accumulate you score worse in a single wave, or how the score system jumps from say 40000 to 110000 in a single wave up. It is just a shooting game at the end of the day, no need to be that rigged and unplayable. Final verdict: REMOVED FEOM LIBRARY.

developer_response.body:
Hey brnblkn, thank you for taking the time to leave a review and share your experience. Sorry to hear you're not enjoying Hyper Bullet!

We'd love to look into the issue you're having with the physics, and in particular, not being able to shoot targets when they're stationary or enlarged! 
If you have the time, please reach out to us via our Discord (linked in-game) or via Email at support@protostargames.com

Regarding the sudden shifts in scoring and wave difficulty: because Hyper Bullet is a rogue-like, the waves, power-ups, and point scaling rely on randomized generation. When those random elements stack up against you, it can feel rigged or unfair. I can promise your there is no hidden system making you miss, but we really appreciate your feedback as it helps us figure out where that random balance might feel a bit too punishing.

Thank you again for sharing your thoughts. We'd love to hear more from you about your experience!

reviews.review_description: I love this game, it’s super fun, fluid, and fast. My one gripe though is that it appears parts of the game are being sold piecemeal. I’d honestly prefer a one-time purchase and have everything unlocked for the for next like 6 content updates than having to purchase each item individually, eg. shotguns and the endless mode being separate purchases.

developer_response.body:
Hey thatphatbaby! Thanks for checking out Hyper Bullet and leaving a review! We're glad you're enjoying the game, and we hear you regarding the one-time purchase. We do plan on releasing a bundle that unlocks everything, so stay tuned!
- Protostar

reviews.review_title: Good Game Here's What it needs
reviews.review_description:
This Game Is Fun BUT it does need some stuff

 The Good: this game is very fun and sort of acts like an aim trainer in a sense and is overall a pretty good simple arcade-Style roguelike

 What's Needed: more Weapons(I personally want A Shotgun or Dual Pistols), A Crosshair because if this game is primarily aim it would be nice to have something to make that aiming part more consistent and IMO wouldn't make it too easy but rather make it more about tracking than being able to eyeball it maybe with a bonus for doing a no crosshair run, Better End Of Level Upgrades Because Yes I get that There are Hacks But it End of level Upgrades Feel Useless as they are temporary and feel so minimal that I Normally Just Grab the Bonus Gold. Lastly this needs to just be a paid game instead of a free with microtransactions game

developer_response.body:
Hey God.Of.Justice, thank you for checking out Hyper Bullet and taking the time to leave a review!

The game already features a shotgun, but we're working on our third weapon at the moment, which should be live quite soon! As for the crosshair feedback, we'll try your idea out and see if it improves the game. We'll also see what we can do about making the end of round rewards more rewarding! 

Thank you again for the feedback, if you ever want to contact us feel free to join the Discord (linked in game) or reach out to us via email at support@protostargames.com
- Protostar

reviews.review_title: My new favorite game for Quest 3
reviews.review_description:
First I want to tackle some of the one star reviews for this game. Wow, you don't need to buy anything to have fun in this game. I played the game without buying anything and had fun for hours. I decided to buy the gun and the endless run (both cost under $15 combined $6 for the gun and $8 for the endless runner) But like I said you don't have to buy anything and it is still a lot of fun. I wanted to support the developers. As for making this game one price. Most games of this type will set you back over $20 to buy the whole thing. And to be honest if this game did this, I would not have tried it for fear the game would be terrible. I believe most people wouldn't have tried it. But if the developers wanted to do a one price unlock everything. There are a few games that I am playing where if you buy three upgrades you unlock everything. Maybe they can do something like this. So far there are only 2 upgrades to unlock.

If you are a fan of rail shooters or gallery shooters please give this a try. It is free, and if you don't like it, well you only wasted the time to download and the time you played, but I am glad I gave this game a shot. 5 stars out of 5.

developer_response.body:
Hey CoolHorror, thank you so much for leaving such a detailed review! We're glad you enjoyed the free version of the game and chose to support us, it means a lot! We'll be sure to check out other games and their pricing strategies as Hyper Bullet continues to be developed. 

If you ever have any more feedback, comments, or questions, don't hesitate to reach out to us at support@protostargames.com, or via the discord linked in-game. 
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: Honestly, a great game. It is really good for practising a.m. and builds that you can get is peak. Is it overall great game ￼

reviews.review_title: 3.5 stars but ill round up and not down
reviews.review_description:
Its pretty fun, definitely challenging for sure. My biggest complaint is that it's really difficult to intuit the best way to progress your perks. 

It feels like there are only a couple very specific combos that will actually let you get enough points to do the harder modes. This could just be user error, but then that goes back to my first point. 

They tell you that you should get perks that increase the base points and then also multipliers so the perks have good synergy, but i feel like ive tried a lot of combinations with this philosophy in mind and it just doesnt work unless you get really lucky and a couple specific perks show up and show up early enough in your shop. 

Maybe i just need to look at some guides to be told what the best combos are but i didn't really want to do that

developer_response.body:
Hey Brobasaur, thank you for taking the time to check out Hyper Bullet and share your thoughts! Figuring out what combination of mods will yield the best score is certainly part of the puzzle, and we hope that in time you're able to find a build that suits the play style you enjoy as well as the achieves the score you're looking for!

If you ever have any other feedback, comments, or questions, don't hesitate to reach out to us on our Discord (link in game), or via email at support@protostargames.com. We'd be glad to follow up with you and find out how your experience in Hyper Bullet develops over time!

- Protostar

reviews.review_title: One of the best arcade shooters
reviews.review_description: Super easy to pick up and play a few rounds. The game devs do a good job fixing exploits/glitches and I think that means allot when it comes to leaderboard fueled games. The test of your skill is fair and just

developer_response.body:
Hey Wendicrow666, thanks for taking the time to leave a review! We're always looking for exploits and balancing the game as new builds are discovered. We'll continue to keep an eye on the leaderboards to make sure they foster a healthy competitive environment! 
- Protostar

reviews.review_title: I’m enjoying it…but I don’t understand I
reviews.review_description:
Simple environment, dynamic targets with bursts of color and sound that draws me into playing round after round.
Now if only I understood how I’m dying? How do I run outta hearts? What is the specific things I need to do to get more? What specifically is causing them to disintegrate?
Is it strictly time? Targets? What?!?

developer_response.body:
Hey Tatsandcats, thanks for checking out Hyper Bullet and leaving a review!

To answer your question: each round you're given 30 seconds to reach the target score. If you don't reach the target score within those 30 seconds you'll lose one heart. When you lose one heart, 10 seconds will be added to the clock to give you a bit more time to reach the target score. If you don't reach the target score in those extra 10 seconds you'll lose another heart! If the timer hits 0 and you've run out of hearts then it will be game over.

If you have any further questions please don't hesitate to reach out to us on our Discord, or via email at support@protostargames.com
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: This game is ok because yes i dont no

developer_response.body:
Hey Strunzfan, thanks for giving Hyper Bullet a go and leaving a review! If you ever have any feedback, comments, or questions, you can reach us on the Discord (linked in-game) or via email at support@protostargames.com
- Protostar

reviews.review_description:
I actually really enjoyed this alot, and will definitely be playing more of it.  Shotguns, machine guns, and 'endless mode' (whatever that is) are locked behind a pay wall of 17 dollars, which is a bit steep in my opinion, for this type of game. 

I think all guns should be unlockable in game, and maybe sell a 10 dollar supporter pack on the side that gives cosmetic skins or something.

I personally like using the pistol, so it doesn't bother me too much, but I can imagine the machine gun comes in handy as a 'pay to win' option in the harder and more challenging levels down the road..

Over all, it's free to try out, and I recommend it to anyone looking for an hour or so of good times for free.

- Thank You to the Devs. <3

developer_response.body:
Hey Jeremiah3132, thank you so much for checking out Hyper Bullet and taking the time to leave such a detailed review! 

To explain endless mode, it lets you continue an endless version of the game once you've defeated the monolith. Endless runs have a separate scoreboard, and you'll encounter some crazy builds with all the extra hacks and augments you're bound to find along the way!

If you have any other feedback, feel free to reach out via email at support@protostargames.com, or join the discord (linked in-game), we'd be happy to have you in the community!
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: Hyper Bullet is an absolute blast. It nails the arcade shooter vibe & features a vibrant art style that is simple yet polished. Because it's a roguelite, every playthrough feels different, making it impossible to put down. You’ll constantly find yourself saying, 'just one more run'. The shotgun wasn't for me. But I enjoyed the endless mode.

developer_response.body:
Hey G2eorge, thanks for checking out Hyper Bullet and taking the time to leave a review! We're glad you're enjoying the game, and finding it addictive! Thank you for also choosing to support the development of the game by purchasing shotgun, we're sorry it wasn't for you! We'll brainstorm how we can improve it as we continue to work towards our next update. 
- Protostar

reviews.review_title: Great game. Not a fan of their pricing
reviews.review_description: I definitely recommend you try the game especially for the free to start price. It has fun game play and it can get pretty addictive. I liked it so much I paid to unlock endless mode. I assumed they were only asking for $8 for the game since the game is still in early access, but I was wrong. The $8 only unlocks the endless mode. Every new gun they add is another $6... I prefer to pay full price for a game knowing that anything that gets added besides a major expansion would be included for free. I'm more than glad to pay $8 or more for an early access game to help fund continued development. I'm not fine with $8 for endless mode only, and $6 dollars for each weapons that will be released. I do not want to be nickel and dimed for everything that gets added. It took me from being excited that they added content to being disappointed that they plan to charge you every time to unlock future guns. Give it a try, maybe you will enjoy the free content. Maybe you don't mind getting charged for every new feature or updates. I just don't think I'm up for it.

developer_response.body:
Hey Deadpoint, thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts and leave a review. We're sorry to disappoint you with regards to the pricing. We wish the whole game could be free, but unfortunately that wouldn't support our small team of 7 to keep developing the game. We'll reach out to you via discord regarding a refund for the endless mode, since it was not what you understood it to be.

We're taking your feedback around the transparency of what endless mode unlocks, and will aim to make it clearer for future players. Thank you again for sharing your thoughts!
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: If you only have time for a quick game this is perfect! Combinations are endless trying to reach the leader board. I’ve been playing everyday for a month and still haven’t cracked it yet. They do try to charge for add ons but the main game is solid!

developer_response.body:
Hey apeanick, thanks for taking the time to leave a review! We're glad you're enjoying the game, and impressed that you've been playing everyday for a month! If you ever have any questions, comments, or feedback don't hesitate to reach out to us at support@protostargames.com, we'd be glad to help! 
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: I highly enjoy everything about this game. I love so much about it I don't have enough space to right it but lemme sum it up. The graphics are really high detail and super fine while not being laggy at all it is just pristine quality. The action feels buttery smooth every shot I just glide to the next target. The upgrades are really sought out and really go with the flow. also devs if you're seeing this I would love a rifle weapon that has a 10 round mag and is full auto but reloads longer.

developer_response.body:
Hey meganado.2024, thank you for taking the time to leave a review and share your thoughts! We're glad you're enjoying the gameplay, and that it's running smoothly for you! We'll note your idea for a rifle and give it a test to see if it ends up being fun. Thanks again for checking out Hyper Bullet and leaving a review! 
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: This game is excellent, and with potential to be one of the bests vr games. It gets things right: the ui is right. The shooting is on point, and the fun is absolutely there. However, charging for every weapon and game mode breaks the deal. Went into discord to find out that is the plan, and now i regret supporting them when i bought endless without thinking. I really hope you backtrack on this decision, it is a shame to see this absolute gem spoiled by tjis. A one time payment would have been a much fair (and deserved) situation.

developer_response.body:
Hey CronZorguz, thank you for taking the time to leave a review and share your thoughts. We're sorry to have disappointed you with the pricing, and we're sorry to hear you regret supporting us. 

We are a small team of just 7, and your support goes a long way to help us keep developing Hyper Bullet, we understand that the purchase of endless mode could have been clearer, and for that reason we encourage you to reach out to us in Discord, or via email at support@protostargames.com to discuss a refund. 

Sorry once again that we couldn't surpass your expectations. We hope to continue improving Hyper Bullet and feedback like yours is invaluable so thank you very much for taking the time to share your thoughts.
- Protostar

reviews.review_description:
The game itself is great, but the monetization model really puts me off.

I’m fine with paying a one-time, full price to unlock the complete game experience, but I don’t accept having to pay separately for every single weapon. I sincerely hope the development team will consider a monetization approach more in line with traditional AAA games. I believe this kind of model is also much closer to what the majority of players in the community are comfortable with and accustomed to.

developer_response.body:
Hey MTE.Norm64V, thank you for taking the time to check out Hyper Bullet and leave us a review. We're still discussing the best course of action as we continue to collect feedback like yours about the pricing, so thank you for sharing your thoughts.

If you ever want to reach out to us and share more feedback, comments, or if you have any questions, don't hesitate to reach out at support@protostargames.com, or you can find us on the discord (link in-game). 
- Protostar

reviews.review_title: Too much fun for a free game
reviews.review_description: The premise is simple—classic arcade style—but it’s incredibly well-polished. Honestly, it shouldn’t even be free; I happily paid to support the developers. I appreciate this pricing model as it allows everyone to contribute what they can afford. I’m hoping for a multiplayer mode in the future (maybe with ways to send debuffs to your opponent!), or at least to see my friends' scores in the leaderboard.

developer_response.body:
Hey grozeille, thank you for taking the time to leave a review! We're glad you're enjoying the game and chose to support us, it means a lot to us! We're working hard on the next update and can't wait to share it with you, stay tuned!
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: Fantastic shooting gallery with surprisingly good music.

developer_response.body:
Hey Demax51, thank you for checking out Hyper Bullet and leaving a review! We're glad you're enjoying the game and it's music. We hope to add some more variety to the music over time, so stay tuned!
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: This is what we expect. Extremely cool feeling better than most games here. I do like the robotic sense of humor, not sure about the add on stuff as a geriatric millennial. Man this game rocks!

developer_response.body:
Hey RunningPenguin8382, thanks for the review! Glad to hear you're enjoying Hyper Bullet, stay tuned for some awesome updates coming soon!
- Protostar

reviews.review_description:
Free content: 1 gun, game play up to the destruction of the shard.
Paid content: Infinite mode (not fun, the escalation goes really high really fast), Each of the other guns. There is currently no way to use the shotgun for free at all.
Pros: Looks good, Feels good, free game play is a lot of fun.
Cons: No regional pricing on DLCs. Every DLC has a price tag. The button says "Unlock" when it should say "Purchase".
I regret buying the infinite mode dlc.

developer_response.body:
Hi kryztoval, thank you for taking the time to leave a review and share your thoughts. We're sorry that you're not enjoying endless mode. We have plans to improve it so we hope you're around to provide feedback on that when we do. 

Whilst the pistol is free, additional weapons will be purchasable add-ons. We've only just rolled out shotgun so we'll look into your feedback around regional pricing.

Thank you again for the feedback, we're sorry that you regret the purchase of endless mode. Your purchase goes a long way to support our small team of 7, and our ambitious dreams for Hyper Bullet, so we're incredibly grateful to have your support and sorry that we've let you down.
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: I saw this game from a YouTube short from my favorite vr creator, and they said the game was free so I downloaded it, and it was really fun 10/10 peak game. It should have won or game of the year imo.

developer_response.body:
Hey CyberTabby, thank you for checking out Hyper Bullet and leaving a review! If you have any other feedback, comments, or questions don't hesitate to reach out to us at support@protostargames.com, or you'll find us in the discord linked in-game. 
- Protostar

reviews.review_description:
I originally had a seriously long review of this game up & even an update to go along with it. However, I've decided  to simplify my take on this game. It SUCKS!!!! Don't waste your time on this exercise in frustration if your an average gamer. Somehow you will be blowing everything off the screen with acute precision & applying all the "add" options the game decided to allow you to pick from & still dying because you can't make the point requirement to proceed!!?? Meanwhile,  there is 50,000,0000 point leader board scores somehow????  Done.. 💩 
UPDATE; Devs.. I appreciate your response & what you mentioned about the cards explaining more of what they do should certainly help. BUT! I'm not just using ADD only mods.. We can see what these people are using to get these scores & it just doesn't make any sense..?? My latest; COG+9, CRESCENDO+3, WRENCH+5, HOLSTER+12, CHILLER+28, BALANCE+11. Score... measly 421,926??? I mean, it's a shame really because I love the look & feel of this game & I would probably be having a complete blast if I never saw the completely ridiculous scores others are getting?? They must be in the hundreds of thousands 5 or 6 levels up the monolith??? REALLY.. REALLY❓️❓️❓️
UPDATE 2; Yup here we are again.. got mods stacked so I'm LITERALLY blowing EVERYTHING off the screen with 1 shot the second targets appear but NOPE... not enough... 💩 There is literally NOTHING  else to shoot? Took a screenshot of my setup, wish I could post it here..🤷‍♂️

developer_response.body:
Hey Deltablow, sorry to hear about your experience, it sounds like you may have a build that in theory works well and clears enemies quickly, but doesn't result in a high score. 

It's possible to have mods that destroy enemies quickly, but at the same time have a build that doesn't reward that sort of play-style. For example, Holster and Freeze generally don't work well together, as a lot of enemies end up staying on screen for longer than 0.5s, cancelling out Holster's benefits. Holster and Lightning work really well together on the other hand. Or better yet add Rampage to the mix and your multiplier will be huge.

Also Cog and Wrench might work well early on in the highest difficulty, but later in the game they're quite weak compared to other combinations. 

Personally when I attempt a run at the highest difficulty, I only reach the end around one in 10-15 times. We hope you consider giving the game another try, and experiment with different combinations of mods. Thank you again for updating your review, keep the feedback coming!
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: Simply an arcade classic in vr form.

developer_response.body:
Hey CoherentFetus, glad to hear you're enjoying Hyper Bullet! If you ever have any feedback don't hesitate to contact us via Discord, or email at support@protostargames.com

reviews.review_description:
Update2:

Because the developer gave a sincere response, I’ve restored my rating to the original five stars. I hope this game continues to improve and adopts a reasonable pricing strategy. I’m happy to pay to support a good game.

——————
Update1:

I don’t like the design of the newly added shotgun—the reload mechanism feels very strange. But since it’s an in-app purchase, I can’t get a refund. I’ve liked this game from the very beginning, and I supported it without hesitation by buying the Endless Mode. However, if every new weapon in the future is going to cost 6 dollars with no option for a refund, then I’ll have to wait and see the reviews before deciding whether to buy it.

Also, there are still many bugs, and even when reporting them on Discord, there’s no response. It’s disappointing, especially since I’ve been actively recommending the game in the community. Because of this, I’m lowering my rating for now, and I’ll consider changing it again after things improve.

——————
For a free game, this is truly a rare and remarkably polished work. With its various components and combinations, it offers a great variety of gameplay. The visuals, performance, sound effects, and music are all excellent — definitely a five-star game.

developer_response.body:
Hey Capt.Taiwan, thank you for your update, we really appreciate your support and your presence in the Hyper Bullet community! If you have any other feedback or constructive criticism, we're always interested to hear it!
- Protostar

reviews.review_description:
Shotgun DLC Update:

During the first few minutes using the shotgun I was thinking "Uh oh. I may have wasted six bucks on this".

The reload is slow as to be expected, but I didn't realize how much more difficult that would make the game.

Then something clicked in my brain and I came up with a strategy that makes things slightly easier for me and a whole lot of fun. The shotgun requires total concentration yet despite the slow loading, the action feels fast somehow. The reload mechanics are pretty clever.  

This DLC isn't just a weapon, it's also a bunch of upgrades that go with it.

It almost feels like a new game mode so $6 seems like a pretty good deal now.

The developers really know what they're doing.

I just have one suggestion. Because the weapons really change up the strategy If possible it would be interesting to have separate leaderboards for each weapon in addition to the overall leaderboard.

Original Review:

Excellent art direction that's beautifully rendered.

Music and sound effects that enhance the Tron-like arcade atmosphere.

Frantic shooting with lots of interesting targets.

Roguelike gameplay loop with tons of strategic choices during a run.

The second time I played I purchased the endless mode. This is a developer to support.

developer_response.body:
Hey Jioxx, thank you for taking the time to leave a review! We understand your experience with shotgun! It can be a bit of a shock to the system when you swap between pistol and shotgun, but hang in there and you'll get it eventually! 

Regarding the leaderboards, we do have separate leaderboards for each weapon, and the endless mode for each weapon - are the different leaderboards not loading for you? 
Feel free to answer in our discord, or via email at support@protostargames.com
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: You need to pay $6 for a single gun and pay some more for endless mode. I don’t care how difficult you make it, just make an optional free way to unlock it. It’s the only other gun in the game and I’m not paying that much for a single weapon

developer_response.body:
Hey TacticalTurnip, we appreciate you taking the time to leave a review and share your thoughts. We're sorry we couldn't meet your expectations around pricing, we're a small team of just 7 developers and whilst we wish everything could be free, if it were we wouldn't be able to develop Hyper Bullet! We hope you can understand that.
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: Love this game so much.  Super addictive and has a great soundtrack.  My only complaint is I have no idea why I'm losing hearts during the game.  I'm not sure if it's because I miss or because I get hit.  I'll scour the interwebs to find the answer though, so not a big deal.  Just a little confusing.  Awesome game though!

developer_response.body:
Hey thetortoiseandi, thank you so much for leaving a review! We've taken your confusion as feedback and are adding a How To Play option to the menu.

To explain how the lives work though: each wave you have 30 seconds to reach the target score. If you don't reach the score within those 30 seconds you'll lose a life. When you lose a life you'll get an additional 10 seconds to give you another chance to reach the target score. 

Hope that makes sense! If you have any questions don't hesitate to reach out via our Discord, or via email at support@protostargames.com.
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: I am really not a fan of shooting games, but this is another level. I love this game. ￼

reviews.review_description:
The game is fun but the devs are not listening to the players. Put one price on the full game and leave it there.
You can't make players pay for every gun or update the price tag is not worth it.

developer_response.body:
Hey Stalker001122, thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We do our best to listen to the community and take all feedback into consideration. Reviews like yours have made a measurable impact and resulted in aspects of the game changing for the better several times. We understand some players don't want to purchase the entire game, and would prefer to only purchase the add-on weapons that appeal to them. Other players like yourself would prefer a single purchase that unlocks everything, and though it's too early to be set in stone, we'll likely offer a bundle that includes all optional purchases when Hyper Bullet releases. It's helpful for us to hear your opinion, so thank you again for taking the time to share it. If you have any other comments, feedback, or questions, we'd love to hear it over on the Discord, or via email at support@protostargames.com 
- Protostar

reviews.review_title: Fun but shotgun is a rip off! Smh
reviews.review_description:
I very much enjoy this game. Play it 
Every day, it's very addictive n a lot of fun. But, i just purchased the shotgun,  believing that it was going to help me to bring my scores up.. n it did nothing but hinder them, given that u have to reload it after every single shot.. I am left feeling that i just got ripped off.. 100%

developer_response.body:
Hey kitkatpow, thanks for taking the time to leave a review. Sorry that you feel ripped off, the truth is that the shotgun has a different play style to the pistol that takes some getting used to. You shouldn't need to reload it after every single shot, if it's fully loaded you can shoot five times before reloading. We hope you give it a chance and get the hang of it! Thank you for choosing to support us with that purchase!
- Protostar

developer_response.body:
Hi CoralBurmese9356, thanks for the feedback and sorry to hear you're experiencing a bug! Could you please let us know if you have the latest version of the game? (In the options it should say 901-12009) 

We'd love to investigate this issue with you and get it resolved. Could you please contact us at support@protostargames.com so we can assist you further?

If you could answer a few questions that would help us track it down!
1. Did you start playing before the game was publicly available by using an early-access key?
2. Could you email support@protostargames.com a screenshot of your Meta cloud backup page so we can see if your game is correctly making cloud saves? When you do, please make sure the drop-down arrow next to Hyper Bullet is expanded so we can see the list of saves.
The cloud save page can be found here: https://secure.oculus.com/my/cloud-backup/

Sorry for the inconvenience, hopefully with your help we can get this issue resolved! 
- Protostar

reviews.review_description:
Gorgeous! That’s exactly why I love VR. Made with love. Highly recommended!


I’d like to wish the developers great success and share a few ideas on how to make the gameplay more diverse (in fact, I have plenty of ideas if you’re interested).
In addition to the roguelike and shooter elements, I’d love to see more situations where you have to use your brain while shooting — moments that require not only quick reflexes but also fast decision-making. That would make for an excellent warm-up and skill-training experience.

For example:

Balls could move in snake-like chains of four, where you either have to precisely shoot out one extra color or destroy the whole chain (hello, Zuma).

Another idea — a “traffic light” level, where the background color determines which balls give you points and which cause penalties (hello, Squid Game). The switch through yellow, as in a real traffic light, would give players a short warning to anticipate the change and make a quick decision.


There are many more ideas — all based on familiar mechanics with simple rules. Perhaps a level editor could bring a massive boost to the variety of gameplay scenarios.

Thank you!

developer_response.body:
Hey ToxaUA, thank you so much for taking the time to leave such an in-depth review with awesome suggestions! If you ever have any more feedback, comments, or questions feel free to reach out to us at support@protostargames.com, we'd be glad to hear from you!
- Protostar

reviews.review_description: It's like those addictive mini-games we play on our phones—fast-paced, intuitive gameplay that keeps you hooked. Plus, with global bloom effects enabled, the visuals are stunningly vibrant. This is a post-processing effect missing from 90% of native Quest games today.

developer_response.body: Hey jacky.chau.980, thank you so much for leaving a review! We're glad you're enjoying the gameplay and visual effects! Feel free to reach out to us at support@protostargames.com if you ever have any extra feedback - Protostar.

reviews.review_description: This shooter game is different from most. It's up to luck of the draw, and skill in your shooting.  Every wave is different from the last. It doesn't repeat over and over like most shooters. You decide what upgrades you get and buy with coinage from playing and each time you select it will be different so you never know what you will get.  I was hooked from wave one. Made it to the top of the first two monoliths but it took many tries and the luck of the draw with upgrades. This game is still being created but it is so much fun as it is, you must get it before the price goes up.

developer_response.body:
Hey JeffRichards, thanks for leaving a review! We're thrilled you were hooked from the first minute and that you enjoy the mix of luck and skill. Congrats on reaching the top of the monoliths! We are working hard on the next update and appreciate the support!
-  Protostar

reviews.review_description:
First impressions:

(+)
Love the retro neon look.
Good music/vibe.
Point and shoot with ramping difficulty.
(-)

So far so good :) keep it up.

reviews.review_description: Fast reactions and accuracy are key. The music and visuals perfectly complement the gameplay, and the mods ensure lasting fun. A two-player mode would be highly desirable and could dethrone games like Point Blank, the best in the genre. I was hooked for hours and couldn't stop. Unfortunately, I haven't yet figured out why I sometimes lose a life in the middle of a challenge, but you just want to play another round and another anyway.

developer_response.body:
Hey LordValFromHell, thank you for the brilliant review! We love to hear how we can improve our games, so thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. 

When it comes to losing a life in the middle of a challenge, it should only happen if the timer reaches 0. When a round begins you have 30 seconds to reach the target score. If you don't reach that score within the 30 seconds then a life will be taken. When a life is taken you'll be granted another 10 seconds to reach the target score. 

If you're losing lives before the timer hits 0, please reach out to us at support@protostargames.com so we can figure out what's going wrong. Thank you again for your review! - Protostar

reviews.review_description: Lovely neon visuals, great sound design, intensely engrossing arcade target shooting action, and requires some strategy to build a deck of power-ups to progress. This is how a fun VR game should be made. Props to the developer, you've done good!

reviews.review_description: Majority of the games I play on the Meta Quest S3 are roguelikes/roguelites. This one is a different kind of them where what you have to kill isn't shooting back at you, but you have to shoot them to get enough points before a time limit runs out. Each time the time limit runs out, you lose a life to gain 10 extra seconds. As simple as the idea is, I'm already addicted after doing a few attempts. So much so that I already bought the endless mode. One of the more fun games I've played. I recommend it. Only complaint I have is I just have one gun so far, the pistol, but I'm assuming either I have to unlock the others, or they're coming in a future update, so that's gonna be resolved at some point. Fantastic game

developer_response.body: Hey BentlyBro5, thank you so much for the review! We're glad to hear you're enjoying the game and chose to support us! We're working on adding the shotgun at the moment, but we do have other guns in development too. We can't wait for you to try them! If you ever have any other feedback, questions, or need help, feel free to reach out to us at support@protostargames.com and we'd be happy to help. - Protostar
